enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, CO on April 2, 2018, explaining he only rode for one two-hour session due to a personal distraction. He also talks about video editing delays, laptop USB port frustrations, and plans to record and grade a 'history test' video the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: MacBooks should have more USB ports; the single port caused workflow bottlenecks
Personal distractions hurt motivation but he intends to get back on track
Believes he is currently burning fat as fuel and can ride a lot without eating much
